meaning: v.避开,躲避n.<俗> 诡计,躲藏
examples: She still drives her trusty old Dodge.
In 1970, at his new wife's behest, they moved to Dodge City.
At its peak, Dodge City was the biggest cow town in the West.
And using the dodge of a recess appointment could cripple any new defence secretary.
But there was a time when Chrysler and Dodge together sold that many minivans.
